methods.description: Procedure for preparing microscope slides of larval cephalic capsules and analyzing them under a microscope to identify and quantify specific deformities in the mentum, used to assess potential biological impacts.

steps.description: After reaching the 4th instar, 454 larvae were randomly separated, on different dates, from the same culture to prepare microscope slides with the cephalic capsules, with an average size of 0.32 ± 0.02 mm, corresponding to this larval stage, according to Strixino and Strixino (1982).
steps.searchable_summary: Select and randomly sample larvae at the 4th instar stage for analysis.

steps.description: The cephalic capsule was separated from the larvae body using a fine-pointed forceps and mounted in slides with ventral part upward in the Hoyer medium.
steps.searchable_summary: Dissect the cephalic capsule from the larval body using forceps.

steps.description: mounted in slides with ventral part upward in the Hoyer medium.That medium is composed of gum arabic, chloral hydrate, glycerol and water and is used to make semi-permanent slide mounts for examination of the cephalic capsule under microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: Mount the separated cephalic capsule on a microscope slide with the ventral side facing upward using Hoyer medium.
outputs: Semi-permanent microscope slides with mounted cephalic capsules

steps.description: For the calculation of deformity frequencies, mentum was considered deformed when presenting: exceeding or missing teeth, central teeth bifurcation or Kohn gap.The last one is a type of deformity where a cavity is formed in the tooth.It differs from a break by having smooth edges.
steps.searchable_summary: Examine the mounted cephalic capsules under a microscope and identify specific types of deformities in the mentum.
inputs: Semi-permanent microscope slides with mounted cephalic capsules
outputs: Observations of mentum deformities per larva

steps.description: For the calculation of deformity frequencies, mentum was considered deformed when presenting: exceeding or missing teeth, central teeth bifurcation or Kohn gap.
steps.searchable_summary: Count the occurrences of each specific type of mentum deformity for each analyzed larva.
inputs: Observations of mentum deformities per larva
outputs: Counts of specific deformity types per larva

steps.description: The frequency of deformities was expressed as a percentage of the total of analyzed larvae.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate the frequency of deformities as a percentage of the total number of analyzed larvae.
inputs: Counts of specific deformity types per larva

steps.description: Four batches of larvae were analyzed under the same laboratory conditions at different dates: 10/04/17; 11/06/17 e 12/07/17 and 12/12/18.
steps.searchable_summary: Repeat the entire procedure for multiple batches of larvae on different dates.
outputs: Multiple sets of deformity frequency data for different batches/dates
